title: We manufacture, sell & install - Potentially looking for someone to help us set up
excerpt:
Hi, 
We are a Bespoke wood flooring company that manufacture, sell and install. We are interested in speaking with someone that may be able to help with the CRM and manufacture aspects of Monday. 
Nick

posts.author: Istoria (Istoria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We are a Bespoke wood flooring company that manufacture, sell and install. We are interested in speaking with someone that may be able to help with the CRM and manufacture aspects of Monday.

Nick

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Istoria !

Setting up monday.com as a CRM with order processing and manufacturing is one of our specialties. We help companies all over the world leverage monday.com as a CRM on a weekly basis.

Feel free to book a free initial session to discuss further. I would love to get to know exactly what you need, how we can help and what your budget is.

Cheers!

Omnitas Consulting are platinum monday.com partners. We are located in Stockholm, Sweden and operate world wide. We are responsible for some of the most complex monday.com implementations out there. Thanks to this we have been awarded Best professional service partner by monday.com both 2019 and 2020.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Istoria and welcome to the monday.com community! Our team at CarbonWeb has installed quite a few specialty CRM solutions within monday.com and have also set up exciting solutions for inventory management and crew dispatching as it relates to service companies.

If these are some of the things you are looking for within your monday.com environment I would be happy to discuss how our team can help. If you’d like to schedule an initial consultation please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck with your project!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to speak with you about monday.com! If you’d like to set up an intro call with our team, please send an email to jenna@iointegration.com. We hope to hear from you! – Jenna and the monday. team @ioi

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Nick,
All that you have described is certainly well within my area of expertise and I would be glad to help you out on all this.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson56782@gmail.com
Cheers and Have a great day ahead,
Andrew

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Istoria

Welcome to the monday Community!

We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We specialise in building custom workflows including CRM Solutions, integrations, automations to make monday.com platform even more powerful within your workspace.

Please book in a complimentary non obligation session here to discuss further.

We would love to hear more on what you are trying to achieve and help you achieve your goals on the platform.

Kind Regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream
